creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 175242
patch to sparc platforms page on website

This text looks like it was written when the FreeBSD/sparc64 port was brand new, rather than aging, ah, gracefully.  Do some rewording.

While here, remove the "contact these folks" section.  None of these folks has been active in working on sparc64 in quite some time.  I hope the SVN logs are a sufficient acknowledgement of their hard work.
